title.es: Auditoría de Datos en EduTrack — Tablas Relacionadas

description.en: Audit EduTrack's normalized schema in Supabase: model students, courses, and enrollments, write 10 multi-table SQL queries (JOINs, GROUP BY, HAVING), and document real findings in `analysis_report.md`.
description.es: Audita el esquema normalizado de EduTrack en Supabase: modela estudiantes, cursos e inscripciones, escribe 10 consultas SQL entre tablas (JOINs, GROUP BY, HAVING) y documenta los hallazgos reales en `analysis_report.md`.

sharing.en: I just completed EduTrack Data Audit — Related Tables with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-engineering-syllabus/tree/main/content/projects/edutrack-data-audit-sql-related-tables #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #sql #supabase #postgres
